examples: But it would address global warming only tangentially.
Tangentially firing is a widely used combustion mode in our pulverized coal boilers.
This is primarily ‘database to database’ information—people are only tangentially involved in most of it.
Many of the government initiatives around small business are tangentially aimed at new maker business.
Gonzales has claimed that he was involved only tangentially in the firing of the U.S. attorneys.
